chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 72 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 05.12.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Even on the last date of hearing, more than a year ago, no one was present. It appears that petitioner has lost interest. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
